title: Variant Features of the Story of the Plague of 'Amawas and the Uncertainty as to the Year That It Occurred
description: 'Amawas340 and the Uncertainty as to the Year That It Occurred According to Ibn Humayd- Salamah-Ibn Ishaq: Then the year 18 (639) began, in which the plague of 'Amawas broke out. One after the other the people perished in it. Also Abu 'Ubaydah b. al338.

sources.citation: al-Tabari, The History of al-Tabari (SUNY), vol. 13
